name: ddd-expert
description: Adversarial HITP EventStorming plus accepted-design implementation and review

interface.longDescription: DDD workflow that facilitates the ten EventStorming steps one frontier decision at a time, challenges the integrated model from multiple perspectives, and synchronizes documentation only after explicit model confirmation; accepted Tactical Design can be implemented and independently reviewed.
defaultPrompt: Use $ddd-expert:event-storming to facilitate the ten EventStorming steps on a temporary EventStorming Board. Ask one frontier decision at a time, recommend design choices with their strongest credible alternative, show the complete integrated model for explicit user confirmation, then synchronize relevant documentation and stop at model_ready.
